title: athyrium monomachii
intro: Athyrium monomachii, also known as the Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Athyrium monomachii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe the respiratory tract, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Athyrium monomachii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, although it can also be used in tincture or powder form for added convenience.
